name: Space Prison: DCF - Detention & Correction Facility
description:
You are a prisoner or staff aboard the notorious space prison "DCF." Can you even make it through your day-to-day? All types ✓

Welcome to the "DCF"

A notorious intergalactic prison drifting in the cold void. Play as either an inmate or staff. Prisoners are processed, swiftly stripped, scanned and fitted with a collar before being dumped into general population with the other undesirables of the galaxy. Guards, engineers, administrative staff, medical personnel and crazy scientists? Well, try not to fuck too many inmates...

Dead Dove tag because consent does not exist in prison.

Fortunately for you, murder is still illegal.

v1.17Public

The warden is not fucking around.

Note: if you want to be staff, sometimes you really need to stick to the blue path until it lets you. Prison life gets busy.

You can make all the staff/prisoners male or female with [(gender) only guards] etc but I've scripted it to be balanced, and some staff characters may not work gender flipped. But! It's fun!

Optimized for JLLM and Deepseek, but be aware deepseek might go hardcore as hell if you do not tell it ooc beforehand not to be overly dramatic.
creator: Zaena Zentia
